comment: Hot-fix overlay for the AppManagerNG / UAD-NG dataset (F102). One entry per package whose safety classification needs to differ from the upstream dataset on a specific OEM / One UI / Android version. Reference: UAD-NG issue tracker. Updated in-place between releases.

overrides.risk: Breaks Mobile Networks settings on affected One UI 8.5 devices
overrides.warning: On One UI 8.5 (S26 / S25 / Z Fold 7 / Z Flip 7 and any device updated to One UI 8) disabling this package breaks Mobile Networks settings on at least Galaxy A57. Reference: UAD-NG issue #1394.

overrides.risk: Can disable Galaxy AI features the user explicitly opted into
overrides.warning: On One UI 8.5+, Samsung Galaxy AI features bind to intelligenceservice2; disabling can disable Galaxy AI features the user has explicitly opted into.
